componentInstanceProperties.name: individualEnrollmentHelptext
componentInstanceProperties.value: You can use the filter on the right to filter the units. To enroll to a unit, click on the "Enroll" button next to a unit.

componentInstanceProperties.name: sessionEnrollmentHelptext
componentInstanceProperties.value: To enroll to a study unit, you need to enroll to at least one unit.

FlexiPage.masterLabel: Individual Program Enrollment Master Record Page
